rows.target_mechanism: constraint retention under pressure without opportunistic completion
rows.expected_observable: downstream decision or response-form change that preserves constraints despite tempting alternative completions

rows.target_mechanism: low-success guard and abstain-or-ask behavior under uncertainty
rows.expected_observable: host-consumable ask/clarify tendency or bounded no-answer when answerability is weak or ambiguity remains unresolved

rows.target_mechanism: sustained continuity across low-cue or delayed follow-up turns
rows.expected_observable: stable public behavior or response tendency across resumed context without full restatement
corrective_trace_presence and a later correction-oriented public shift on a related follow-up
rows.interpretation: shadow path exercised with no public delta

rows.target_mechanism: plastic writeback after failure and later decision change
rows.expected_observable: downstream decision change on a paired follow-up after explicit or implicit negative feedback
rows.interpretation: shadow path exercised with no public delta

rows.target_mechanism: boundary-sensitive tool caution under underspecification or risk
rows.expected_observable: host policy hint or public tendency shifts toward clarify, constrain, or avoid unsafe direct tool action
